name_cn:
『Balenciaga Balenciaga』
Hourglass Plain Black
This season's heavy plain Hourglass bag. The unique signature curved shape is highly recognizable, instantly brightening the eyes and looking super cool! Smooth surface, crescent moon shape, with a metal B-shaped drop. Calfskin texture is very touching and stylish 🖤🖤🖤
Small size: 19x8x21cm
Large size: 23x10x24cm
